criteria.name: Projection Quality
criteria.1: No rest-of-season projections pulled, used season-to-date counting stats as proxy, or used only one unverified source without a URL
criteria.3: FanGraphs ATC rest-of-season projections pulled for all players involved, source URLs cited, one or two players missing minor fields (e.g., QS projection estimated by heuristic)
criteria.5: FanGraphs ATC rest-of-season (atcr) pulled for every player with source URL cited, fallback (Depth Charts or Razzball) cross-checked where ATC and roles diverge, IL status verified on RotoWire, any projection >15% discrepancy between sources uses the conservative value with rationale

criteria.name: Counting Category Math
criteria.1: Counting deltas computed from full-season not ROS, or sign errors (e.g., IN minus OUT reversed), or cats missing entirely
criteria.3: All seven counting cats (R, HR, RBI, SB, K, QS, SV) computed from ROS projections with correct IN-minus-OUT subtraction, table displayed both teams side by side
criteria.5: All counting cats computed from ROS ATC, table shows raw deltas both our side and mirror (their side), SV projections validated against save_role_certainty from mlb-closer-tracker, QS projections pulled directly (not heuristic) from FanGraphs

criteria.name: Ratio Category Math
criteria.1: Simple arithmetic differences of team-level OBP/ERA/WHIP averages used (wrong), or ratio cats omitted entirely
criteria.3: Volume-weighted computation attempted for OBP, ERA, WHIP (PA or IP as denominator), minor scaling errors or sign confusion on ERA/WHIP
criteria.5: Ratio cats weighted by PA (OBP) or IP (ERA, WHIP) using implied-components method (ER, baserunners), sign correctly flipped for ERA and WHIP so positive contribution to trade_cat_delta means trade helps us, scaling to common units documented (OBP×10000, ERA×50, WHIP×200)

criteria.name: cat_pressure Weighting
criteria.1: Flat (uniform 1.0) weights used across all 10 cats, or cat_pressure not read from the category-state signal file
criteria.3: cat_pressure read from the most recent cat-state signal, weight = pressure/50 applied to each cat, weighted sum computed
criteria.5: cat_pressure read from today's cat-state signal file with source file path cited, weight formula (pressure/50) applied to each of the 10 cats, weighted sum computed and displayed alongside raw sum, any cat with pressure>=80 flagged as a forced-reject trigger if its delta is negative, mirror-side uses raw (not our) pressures with rationale

criteria.name: trade_value_delta Dollar Calculation (Raw)
criteria.1: No dollar value computed, or a made-up number not sourced from an auction calculator
criteria.3: FanGraphs Auction Calculator values pulled for each player, raw net delta computed
criteria.5: FanGraphs AC values configured for 12-team H2H OBP-variant 5x5 league, pulled for all players with source URL, ROS version used, injury discount applied for any IL player with >4 weeks of expected missed time, fallback to Razzball with OBP adjustment documented when FG unavailable, raw delta clearly labeled as input to the slot-value and adverse-selection stages (not the final verdict number)

criteria.name: Slot-Value Bonus Application
criteria.1: slot_value_delta not computed, computed with wrong sign, or applied only to our side (ignoring the symmetric case where the opponent frees a slot)
criteria.3: slot_value_delta computed as (N_slots_cleared_us − N_slots_cleared_them) × $2.50, included in trade_value_delta_pre_adj, basic rationale given
criteria.5: slot_value_delta computed correctly and symmetrically (both sides evaluated), max(0, ...) applied so a side that takes on more players gets 0 cleared slots on that side, $2.50 per slot unit cited with rationale (streaming, IL stashes, handcuff speculation), value added to trade_value_delta_raw to produce trade_value_delta_pre_adj, 2-for-1 examples worked out in the signal, bench-slot optionality explicitly NOT double-counted in positional_flex_delta, plain-English explanation given to the beginner user ("every open bench slot is worth about $2-3 because we can stream a pitcher or stash an injured returner")

criteria.name: Adverse-Selection Integration
criteria.1: Did not invoke @skills/adverse-selection-prior/, or computed a prior inline instead of delegating, or did not consume the skill's output contract
criteria.3: Invoked @skills/adverse-selection-prior/ with the four required inputs (offer_type, proposer_archetype, offer_symmetry_score, proposer_info_asymmetry) and multiplied trade_value_delta_pre_adj by recommended_adjustment
criteria.5: Invoked @skills/adverse-selection-prior/ with all four inputs correctly derived from upstream signals (offer_type from trade context, proposer_archetype read verbatim from context/opponents/<team>.md, offer_symmetry_score mapped from pre-adj ratio per the methodology table, proposer_info_asymmetry scored with all adjustments for injury/closer/regression news), consumed the full output contract (prior_ev_probability stored in signal, recommended_adjustment applied multiplicatively to trade_value_delta_pre_adj, bayesian_rationale embedded in verdict rationale, override_hints each added as red_team_findings), adverse_selection_adjustment_pct recorded as (1 − recommended_adjustment) × 100, the haircut applied ONLY to the dollar delta (not to per-category deltas), delegation not duplicated inline

criteria.name: positional_flex_delta Scoring
criteria.1: Position impact not evaluated, or scored as binary up/down with no rationale
criteria.3: Position flex scored on a -100 to +100 scale using scarcity of positions (C, SS scarce; OF abundant) and bench/slot impacts, total computed
criteria.5: Each contributing factor scored individually per the scoring anchors (scarce-position gain/loss, multi-position eligibility, SP/RP count alignment with starting slots), contributions summed and clamped to [-100, +100], bench-slot optionality explicitly excluded to avoid double-counting with slot_value_delta, table in the template fully populated, written in beginner-voice

criteria.name: playoff_impact Computation
criteria.1: playoff_impact skipped or set to arbitrary value regardless of date
criteria.3: Pre-July set to 50/neutral with note, July+ attempts computation using team schedules
criteria.5: Date-gated (pre-July = 50 with N/A note), July 1-14 computed at normal weight, July 15+ computed and double-weighted in verdict, games×matchup_quality pulled from mlb-playoff-scheduler signal with source URL, pitcher playoff_games converted to projected STARTS (not team games) via Roster Resource probables grid, clamped to 0-100 with 50 neutral anchor

criteria.name: Verdict-Ladder Correctness
criteria.1: Did not apply the +15% / −20% ladder on delta_pct, used old +$5/−$5 dollar thresholds, pure-rejected in the middle band, or accepted below the +15% threshold
criteria.3: Computed delta_pct = trade_value_delta_adjusted / Σ$_OUT, applied the three-tier ladder (ACCEPT ≥ +15%, COUNTER middle band, REJECT ≤ −20%), produced a counter when verdict is COUNTER
criteria.5: Computed delta_pct correctly on the post-haircut adjusted delta; enforced ACCEPT only when delta_pct ≥ +15% AND advocate/critic variants agree AND no cat with pressure ≥ 80 has negative weighted delta; enforced REJECT only when delta_pct ≤ −20% AND prior_ev_probability ≤ 0.35 (otherwise downgraded to COUNTER with a more demanding ask); applied the always-counter rule in the middle band (never pure-REJECT); when only one REJECT condition held, downgraded to COUNTER; forced-REJECT overrides (high-pressure cat negative, IL unknown, July 15+ playoff ≤ 40) evaluated explicitly; tie at boundary resolved toward COUNTER; rationale explicitly names which condition(s) drove the verdict; even on REJECT, the counter we would have sent is documented in the signal for relationship log

criteria.name: Counter-Offer Specificity
criteria.1: Verdict is COUNTER (or REJECT) but no specific counter-package is proposed (just 'ask for more'), or counter is obviously extractive and will be rejected
criteria.3: Counter proposes a specific named player to add or swap, identifies the gap the counter closes
criteria.5: Counter identifies the specific gap (value short by $X to reach +15%, or cat-C negative at pressure ≥80, or flex marginal), scans opponent's actual Yahoo roster for plausible candidates, proposes a specific named player (not a tier), estimates acceptance probability with one sentence of rationale, provides a fallback ladder (primary counter → smaller counter → REJECT on second refusal), counter-package produced even when verdict is REJECT (for relationship log, with counter_sent: false flag)

criteria.name: Documentation and Signal Compliance
criteria.1: No signal file written, or output not in the template schema, or no source URLs, or no confidence score
criteria.3: Signal file written to signals/YYYY-MM-DD-trade-<opponent>.md with frontmatter and major fields populated, source URLs cited for projections
criteria.5: Signal file fully compliant with the signal-framework schema, frontmatter includes all new fields (trade_value_delta_raw, slot_value_delta, trade_value_delta_pre_adj, prior_ev_probability, recommended_adjustment, adverse_selection_adjustment_pct, trade_value_delta_adjusted, delta_pct, opponent_archetype, counter_sent), every projection and dollar value has a source URL, confidence >=0.5 for a final verdict (or <0.5 with explicit note), red_team_findings includes every override_hint from the adverse-selection-prior output, decision log entry emitted via mlb-decision-logger with will_verify_on date 4 weeks out, output written in beginner-voice with jargon translated inline, ends with a single-verb recommendation (ACCEPT / COUNTER / REJECT)

key_requirements: Compute slot_value_delta carefully — a 2-for-1 from our side yields +$2.50, not zero
Expect a 0.85-0.90 haircut from adverse-selection-prior on an active-archetype star-for-depth offer
In the middle band, always counter with a specific ask (not a dismissive REJECT)
common_pitfalls: Treating the +$2.50 slot bonus as decisive when delta_pct is still well below +15%
Letting the headline star's name override the math after the haircut is applied
Ignoring that the archetype-driven haircut is what shifts a borderline ACCEPT into COUNTER

key_requirements: Read cat_pressure carefully: does the swap match OUR pressures or THEIRS?
Even if on-surface the swap looks balanced, the adverse-selection-prior haircut (0.85-0.90) can push delta_pct out of the ACCEPT band
Only ACCEPT when gained cats have pressure >=70 AND given-up cats have pressure <=40 AND delta_pct >= +15% post-haircut
common_pitfalls: Assuming category swaps are automatically fair because both sides address weaknesses
Using today's standings instead of rest-of-season projections
Skipping the haircut because 'it's symmetric' — symmetric is what Akerlof warns against

key_requirements: Cross-reference mlb-regression-flagger signal for each player's regression_index
Set proposer_info_asymmetry low (30-40) when our own regression model is strong — we have insight they may not
Shallow haircut (0.95) may let a flat-dollar trade clear +15% if regression thesis is strong
common_pitfalls: Anchoring on season-to-date results when xwOBA/xERA tell a different story
Forgetting to lower proposer_info_asymmetry when we have the regression edge — leading to an over-deep haircut

key_requirements: RotoWire injury report check is step 1
Set proposer_info_asymmetry to 80+ (they know more about the injury)
Expected recommended_adjustment ≈ 0.80 — deep haircut often pushes delta_pct into REJECT band
common_pitfalls: Trusting ATC for a player who went on IL in the last 7 days
Using default asymmetry of 50 when the injury context clearly warrants 80+

key_requirements: Pull weeks 21-23 game counts per team from mlb.com/schedule
For SPs, convert to projected starts using Roster Resource probables grid
Double-weight playoff_impact for trades proposed July 15 or later
Playoff-impact positive swings can tip close COUNTER cases into ACCEPT only if delta_pct is already within ~3% of +15%
common_pitfalls: Counting team games as pitcher starts
Using playoff_impact as a primary driver when delta_pct is deep in the middle band

common_failure_modes.symptom: Signal file has no prior_ev_probability, recommended_adjustment, or adverse_selection_adjustment_pct fields
common_failure_modes.detection: Grep the signal for 'prior_ev_probability'; if missing, Step 7 was skipped
common_failure_modes.fix: Invoke @skills/adverse-selection-prior/ with the four required inputs; consume the full output contract (all four fields stored in the signal)

common_failure_modes.symptom: The evaluator computes its own Bayesian update instead of delegating
common_failure_modes.detection: Grep the skill output for 'base_prior', 'symmetry_delta', or 'archetype_delta' — these belong only in the delegated skill
common_failure_modes.fix: Remove inline Bayesian math. Call @skills/adverse-selection-prior/ and consume its output. Single source of truth.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Weighted cat deltas look damped; cat delta table numbers don't match the ROS projection arithmetic
common_failure_modes.detection: Recompute any cat weighted delta manually; if the result doesn't match, the haircut was wrongly applied to cats
common_failure_modes.fix: Apply recommended_adjustment ONLY to trade_value_delta_pre_adj, producing trade_value_delta_adjusted. Cat deltas stay un-haircut.

common_failure_modes.symptom: 2-for-1 trade not credited with +$2.50; signal file has no slot_value_delta field
common_failure_modes.detection: If players_in != players_out in the signal, slot_value_delta must be non-zero
common_failure_modes.fix: Compute in Step 6 symmetrically: (slots_cleared_us − slots_cleared_them) × $2.50. Include even when zero.

common_failure_modes.symptom: A 2-for-1 earns +$2.50 in slot_value_delta AND +10 in positional_flex_delta 'bench consolidation'
common_failure_modes.detection: Check whether positional_flex_delta includes a +10 bench-consolidation line for the same 2-for-1 that earned slot_value_delta
common_failure_modes.fix: Remove the flex +10 for bench-consolidation when slot_value_delta is non-zero. Optionality is captured in dollars via slot_value_delta; flex captures starting-slot fit only.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Verdict is REJECT but delta_pct > −20% or prior_ev_probability > 0.35
common_failure_modes.detection: Check both REJECT conditions in the decision block; if either fails, verdict must be COUNTER
common_failure_modes.fix: Downgrade to COUNTER with a specific package. Pure REJECT is reserved for clearly predatory offers only (both conditions met).

common_failure_modes.symptom: Verdict is ACCEPT at delta_pct between +5% and +14.9%
common_failure_modes.detection: The new threshold is +15% post-haircut, not +5% (old) or 0% (naive)
common_failure_modes.fix: If delta_pct < +15%, verdict is COUNTER. Squeeze more value via a specific counter-package ask.

common_failure_modes.failure: Archetype defaulted to 'unknown' with file present
common_failure_modes.symptom: adverse-selection-prior input shows proposer_archetype=unknown but context/opponents/<team>.md exists
common_failure_modes.detection: Check whether context/opponents/<opponent-slug>.md was read before Step 7
common_failure_modes.fix: Read the opponent profile file (written by mlb-opponent-profiler) and pass the archetype verbatim to the prior skill.

common_failure_modes.symptom: A player with 20 HR in April is valued as if he'll hit 40+ over the full season
common_failure_modes.fix: Switch to atcr. Re-pull all projections.

common_failure_modes.symptom: OBP delta reported as (AVG(OBP_IN)) - (AVG(OBP_OUT)) without weighting
common_failure_modes.detection: Compute weighted version; if differs by >0.002, simple version was used
common_failure_modes.fix: Weight by PA (OBP) or IP (ERA, WHIP) per the ratio category math section

common_failure_modes.symptom: Weighted sum equals raw sum despite varied pressures
common_failure_modes.detection: Check cat-state signal; if pressures vary (range > 30) but weighted = raw, weighting wasn't applied

common_failure_modes.symptom: Verdict is COUNTER (or REJECT with documented counter) but no specific player named
common_failure_modes.detection: Grep the output for a named player in the counter section
common_failure_modes.fix: Pull the opponent's Yahoo roster. Name a specific player that closes the quantified gap to +15%. Pre-commit to fallback ladder.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Incoming player is projected at full value but is on the IL
common_failure_modes.detection: Cross-check RotoWire for every IN player
common_failure_modes.fix: Scale the ROS projection manually, or force REJECT if return date unknown

common_failure_modes.symptom: A trade that gains a better pitcher shows negative weighted delta in ERA/WHIP
common_failure_modes.detection: Spot-check: lower ERA/WHIP IN should contribute POSITIVELY to trade_cat_delta
common_failure_modes.fix: Multiply raw ratio delta by -1 before scaling

common_failure_modes.symptom: Verdict is ACCEPT despite a pressure ≥ 80 cat having negative weighted delta
common_failure_modes.detection: Walk the forced-REJECT override list for every verdict
common_failure_modes.fix: Force REJECT (or at minimum COUNTER with a cat-specific throw-in ask)

common_failure_modes.symptom: Mirror analysis uses our cat_pressure values
common_failure_modes.detection: Check the mirror table weights vs our pressures
common_failure_modes.fix: Use raw deltas (or their standings-derived pressures) for the mirror

common_failure_modes.failure: No commissioner-review flag on lopsided gain
common_failure_modes.symptom: delta_pct >= +25% accepted without noting review risk
common_failure_modes.detection: Any trade with delta_pct >= +25% triggers review risk in this league
common_failure_modes.fix: Add red_team finding about commissioner review; consider restructuring counter to make the gain less lopsided on paper
